auth_waiting: Waiting for your personal macros tracking service to respond.
password_requirements: At least 8 characters with uppercase, lowercase, a number, and a special character.
reset_password_intro: Enter your email address and we will send you a link to choose a new password.
reset_password_sent: If an account with that email exists, password reset instructions have been sent.
reset_password_done: Password updated. You can sign in with your new password.
reset_password_invalid_link: This reset link is invalid or has expired. Request a new one from the sign-in page.
password_too_short: Password must be at least 8 characters.
password_too_long: Password must be at most 72 characters.
password_needs_upper: Password must include an uppercase letter.
password_needs_lower: Password must include a lowercase letter.
password_needs_special: Password must include a special character.
ios_register_hint: Sign in with your Apple ID to link your iOS app and sync meals to the web.
auth_oauth_failed: Sign in with Apple failed. Please try again.
settings_sync_apple: Your account is linked with Apple ID. Meals sync between the iOS app and this website.
settings_sync_local: Enable Cloud Sync in the iOS app settings and sign in with the same Apple ID to sync meals here.
title: Title
calories_required: Calories are required — enter a value greater than 0.
tooltip_guess: Guess = estimate; Accurate = you measured or read it from a label.
tooltip_title: A short name for this meal, e.g. Breakfast or Post-workout shake.
tooltip_date: When you ate this meal. Tap Now to use the current date and time.
tooltip_calories: Total energy for this meal in kilocalories (kcal). Required.
tooltip_sodium: Sodium in milligrams. Optional unless you track it.
tooltip_carbohydrates: Total carbohydrates in grams. Expand for starch, sugars, and fibre.
tooltip_sugars: Total sugars in grams (includes natural and added).
tooltip_fat: Total fat in grams. Expand for fat breakdown.
tooltip_polyunsaturated_fat: Polyunsaturated fat (e.g. nuts, seeds, fish oil).
tooltip_trans_fat: Trans fat in grams — usually near zero.
tooltip_protein: Total protein in grams. Expand for source breakdown.
tooltip_animal_protein: Protein from animal sources (meat, dairy, eggs).
export_json_hint: Download all your meals and photo metadata as a JSON file for backup or use in other apps.
medical_disclaimer: This app is for informational purposes only and does not constitute medical advice. Consult a qualified healthcare professional before making dietary or health decisions.
load_data_failed: Couldn't load your data. Please try again.
report_empty_range: Choose a valid custom date range.
max_photos_add: Only added {n} photo(s) — limit is {max} per meal.
max_photos_existing: This meal already has {n} photos (the maximum).
delete_account_hint: Permanently delete your account and all meals, photos, and sync data. This cannot be undone.
delete_account_confirm: Delete your account permanently? All meals, photos, and sync data will be lost. This cannot be undone.
delete_account_error: Could not delete your account. Please try again.
